name: Sweep Border
description: Rounded corners and a window border with a moving colour sweep. Two colours circulate around the border band, and the sweep dims when the surface loses focus. Width, corner radius, sweep speed and the two colours are this pack's own parameters.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Roundness of the corners (px, 0 for square)

parameters.name: Sweep speed
parameters.description: How many times per second the colours travel around the border

parameters.name: First colour
parameters.description: First colour of the travelling sweep

parameters.name: Second colour
parameters.description: Second colour of the travelling sweep
